data.description:
Pure/mechanical module-size split so `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py` (currently 930 LOC, > the 800 soft cap) graduates off the size gate. Extract the deterministic Pass-4 move-catalog CONTENT + the R6 advisory-triage stage into a NEW leaf sibling `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py` along the Pass-4 boundary the module already carves.

MOVE (locate by NAME, current origin/main): `MOVE_REGISTRY`, `load_move_registry`, `APPLY_NOW_MARGIN`, `triage_advisories` (~160 LOC). The new leaf imports ONLY `rebar.llm.review_kernel` (for `validate_move_registry` + `DEFAULT_BLOCK_THRESHOLD`) — no back-reference to passes.py, so no cycle.

DEVIATION from the docs/architecture.md offenders row: that row names the coach cluster as `MOVE_REGISTRY`, `load_move_registry`, AND `pass4_coach` -> `coach_moves.py`. The target file name (coach_moves.py) and MOVE_REGISTRY/load_move_registry match the code, but `pass4_coach` CANNOT move: it builds a `RunRequest` through passes.py internals (`_resolve_system`, `PASS_COACH`), so relocating it would create a circular import leaf->passes. So `pass4_coach` STAYS in passes.py, and `triage_advisories` + `APPLY_NOW_MARGIN` (already-deterministic, review_kernel-only) are moved instead to clear the cap. This ticket updates/deletes that stale row.

BACK-COMPAT: passes.py re-imports and re-exports all 4 moved symbols (`# noqa: F401`) so `passes.MOVE_REGISTRY` / `passes.load_move_registry` / `passes.APPLY_NOW_MARGIN` / `passes.triage_advisories` and the orchestrator re-exports (`orchestrator.MOVE_REGISTRY` / `orchestrator.load_move_registry`) and workflow_ops (`passes.load_move_registry` / `passes.triage_advisories`) keep resolving unchanged. Now-unused `import json` and `from pathlib import Path` are removed from passes.py.

Acceptance criteria (observable, in-session-verifiable):
- NEW `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py` exists, 100-800 LOC by `wc -l`, defining MOVE_REGISTRY, load_move_registry, APPLY_NOW_MARGIN, triage_advisories; importing only rebar.llm.review_kernel.
- `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py` is <= 800 LOC by `wc -l` (lands ~775) and re-exports the 4 moved symbols.
- passes.py removed from `.github/module-size-allowlist.txt` AND `.github/module-size-ceilings.txt`; its remedy row deleted from `docs/architecture.md` offenders table.
- `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py` passes (allowlist == over-cap set == ceilings keys).
- `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review_triage.py tests/unit/test_plan_review.py tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py tests/unit/test_review_kernel.py tests/unit/test_plan_review_g7.py` passes.
- `make lint` passes (ruff check + format-check).

This is a pure/mechanical refactor with NO signature or logic changes; E5 testing-plan is not-applicable — the existing test suites are the behavioral oracle.
data.title: Graduate llm/plan_review/passes.py off the module-size gate — extract the Pass-4 coach catalog + advisory triage into coach_moves.py
